title: Dye Tweaks
description: Adds the ability to duplicate dyes efficiently
body:
## Dye Tweaks Data Pack

Enhance your Minecraft dye crafting with the Dye Tweaks data pack! This pack allows you to efficiently craft dyes by combining different dye colors using simple recipes.

### Features:
- **Efficient Dye Crafting:** Convert white dye and any other dye into more of that dye efficiently.
- **Universal Recipes:** Works with all dyes in Minecraft, making dye crafting versatile and straightforward.

![Red dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73588ed3116ef1478b0a51fb133536a0e032efc8.png)
![Blue dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09d151ec40dbeba8263402202d8c170652f18053.png)

### How to Use:
1. **Download the Dye Tweaks Data Pack.**
2. **Place the file in the "datapacks" folder** of your Minecraft world save.
3. **Launch Minecraft** and open your world.
4. Use the **/reload command** to activate the data pack.
5. **Start crafting** and enjoy more efficient dye production for all your building and decoration needs!

### Compatibility:
- No additional dependencies required.

### Simplify Your Gameplay:
Streamline your dye crafting process with Dye Tweaks. Perfect for builders and decorators, this data pack ensures you have the dyes you need, when you need them.

Download Dye Tweaks now and color your Minecraft world with ease!
